affected_groups: Families and young children near schools facing unplanned closure
Disadvantaged (low-SES) pupils competing for shrinking admission places
Teachers in schools subject to consolidation or closure
The future digital/knowledge-economy labour market drawing on a shrinking youth cohort
Rural and general (primary) schools facing disproportionate workload and closure risk relative to urban schools
content.decision_question: Equity and coordinated stewardship versus administrative inertia/laissez-faire non-intervention
content.tension: Passive demographic contraction without an active equity or network-planning lever is a policy abdication that entrenches existing SES-based gatekeeping, risks uncoordinated and unsafe school closures, and wastes scarce future talent in a shrinking labour-market cohort.
content.title: Decision tension A14: S5
